_comment: MCP server template — internal API gateway access. Used to give Claude read (or limited write) access to internal services via a service account.
name: internal-api
description: Call internal service APIs through the platform API gateway using service-account credentials

env.SERVICE_ACCOUNT_TOKEN: <FILL_IN: service account token with minimum required scopes>

defaultHeaders.X-Caller-Service: <FILL_IN: name of the calling service, for audit logging>

_notes: Limit the service account to the minimum API scopes needed for Claude's tasks.
Use allowedHostPatterns and blockedPathPatterns to prevent Claude from calling arbitrary external URLs.
Service account tokens must follow the same rotation schedule as other secrets: <FILL_IN: e.g. 90 days>.
For write operations (POST/PUT/DELETE), add a comment in your service CLAUDE.md explaining the specific use case and who approved it.
